full_text:
Gongsun Xiu 公孫修
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Xiu (公孫修)was born in Xiangping county, Liaodong commandery. Originally served Wei. Rebelled with his father, Yuan, and was executed by Sima Yi. Gongsun Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Gongsun Yuan. Gongsun Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
